question: Un saare districts ke district names list karo jo 'Bihar' state mein located hain.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Bihar'

question: Assam state ki state ID identify karo, aur phir us state ID se associated saare district names ki list nikaalo, district name ke hisaab se alphabetically sort karke.
sql: SELECT DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT WHERE STATE_ID IN (SELECT STATE_ID FROM DIM_STATE WHERE STATE_NAME = 'Assam') ORDER BY DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: 'Assam' state ke saare district names ki list dikhao, unhe district name ke hisaab se group aur alphabetically order karke.
sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' GROUP BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' state ke saare district names list karo, unhe district name ke hisaab se group aur alphabetically order karke dikhao.
sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Un locations ke district names list karo jahan state name ya toh 'Assam' hai ya 'Bihar'.
sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' OR T1.STATE_NAME = 'Bihar';

question: Un locations ke district names list karo jahan state name ya toh 'Andhra Pradesh' hai ya 'Arunachal Pradesh'.
sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' OR T1.STATE_NAME = 'Arunachal Pradesh';

question: Andhra Pradesh aur Arunachal Pradesh states ke liye, har state name aur unke total district IDs ka count list karo, basharte ki us state ke district IDs ka count kam se kam ek ho.
sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T1.DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' OR T2.STATE_NAME = 'Arunachal Pradesh' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T1.DISTRICT_ID) >= 1

question: Andhra Pradesh state ke liye, har district name aur maternity and child welfare centres ka total count list karo, total count ke hisaab se descending order mein sort karo, aur sirf top 5 districts dikhao.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T1.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID WHERE T4.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Un districts ke naam list karo jo 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' state mein hain aur jinka district ID count zero se zyada hai, aur top 5 results dikhao district IDs ke count ke descending order mein.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T1.DISTRICT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(T1.DISTRICT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5

question: 'Assam' state ke district names list karo, unhe name se group karo jahan district IDs ka count zero se zyada ho, aur highest district IDs count wale top 5 districts dikhao.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T1.DISTRICT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(T1.DISTRICT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5

question: India ke top 5 districts ke district names aur total number of child welfare centres list karo, child welfare centres ke sum ke descending order mein.
sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) FROM FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T3.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T5 ON T4.COUNTRY_ID = T5.COUNTRY_ID WHERE T5.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Un saare records ke district names list karo jahan state name 'Assam' hai.
sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam';

question: 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' state ke liye saare district names ki list dikhao.
sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands';

question: Un saare districts ke district names list karo jo 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' state mein located hain, aur unhe district name ke basis pe group karo.
sql: SELECT DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT WHERE STATE_ID IN (SELECT STATE_ID FROM DIM_STATE WHERE STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands') GROUP BY DISTRICT_NAME

question: Un saare districts ke district names list karo jo 'Assam' state mein located hain, aur unhe district name ke hisaab se group karo.
sql: SELECT DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT WHERE STATE_ID IN (SELECT STATE_ID FROM DIM_STATE WHERE STATE_NAME = 'Assam') GROUP BY DISTRICT_NAME

question: 'Nicobars' naam ke district mein jitne bhi sub-districts aate hain, un sabhi ke sub-district names list kijiye.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Nicobars'

question: 'Nicobars' district ke andar jitne bhi sub-district names hain unki list dikhao, aur unhe sub-district name ke hisaab se alphabetically order karo.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Nicobars' ORDER BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME

question: 'North And Middle Andaman' naam ke district ke liye, district name aur sub-district IDs ka total count list karo, lekin sirf tabhi agar wo count ek se zyada ho.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'North And Middle Andaman' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) > 1

question: 'North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars', 'Kurnool', aur 'South Andamans' districts ke liye district names aur sub-district IDs ka count dikhao. Data ko district name se group karo, sub-district IDs ke count ke basis par descending order mein sort karo, aur sirf top 5 results display karo.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME IN ('North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars', 'Kurnool', 'South Andamans') GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Un states ke district names aur unke sub-district names ka count dikhao jinka state ID 1 ya 2 hai, aur district ID 1 se 3 ke beech mein hai; sirf wahi districts include karo jinka kam se kam ek sub-district ID ho, aur top 5 results ko sub-district names ke count ke hisaab se descending order mein show karo.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_ID IN (1, 2) AND T2.DISTRICT_ID BETWEEN 1 AND 3 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Saare sub-districts ke liye sub-district name, district name, aur state name ki list dikhao.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T3.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID;

question: Un sabhi records ke liye sub-district name, district name, aur state name list karo jahan state name 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' hai, aur result ko state name ke hisaab se alphabetically order kar do.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T3.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T3.STATE_NAME = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' ORDER BY T3.STATE_NAME ASC

question: Un sabhi records ke liye sub-district name, district name, aur state name list karo jahan district name 'North And Middle Andaman' hai, aur results ko state name ke hisaab se alphabetically order karo.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T3.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T2.DISTRICT_NAME = 'North And Middle Andaman' ORDER BY T3.STATE_NAME ASC

question: Har state ID ke liye, uska state ID aur usse jude sub-district names ka total count provide karein.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_ID, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_ID

question: Har ek state name aur usse linked sub-district IDs ka total count list karo, state name ke hisaab se group karke aur highest se lowest count ke order mein.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) DESC

question: 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' aur 'Assam' states ke liye har state name aur unke total sub-district names ka count dikhao, state name se group karke aur sub-districts ke count ke hisaab se descending order mein sort karke.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME IN ('Andaman And Nicobar Islands', 'Assam') GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME) DESC

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan scheduled tribes ki rural population 22.000 se zyada hai aur scheduled castes ki rural population exactly 0.000 hai.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION > 22.000 AND T2.SCHEDULED_CASTES_RURAL_POPULATION = 0.000

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan scheduled tribes rural population zero se zyada hai aur scheduled castes rural population exactly zero hai.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION > 0.000 AND T2.SCHEDULED_CASTES_RURAL_POPULATION = 0.000

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan scheduled tribes rural population 22.000 se zyada ho aur scheduled castes rural population exactly 0.000 ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION > 22.000 AND T2.SCHEDULED_CASTES_RURAL_POPULATION = 0.000

question: Un sub-district names aur total scheduled tribes rural population ki list dikhao jahan scheduled castes rural population exactly 0.000 ho, sirf wahi sub-districts include karna jinki total scheduled tribes rural population 0 se zyada ho, aur results ko sub-district name ke hisaab se alphabetically order kar do.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.SCHEDULED_CASTES_RURAL_POPULATION = '0.000' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) > 0 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME

question: Aise sub-districts jahan rural scheduled castes population 0.000 hai, unka sub-district name aur rural scheduled tribes population ka total sum list karein, basharte ye sum 20 se zyada ho, aur results ko sub-district name ke hisaab se alphabetically sort karein.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.SCHEDULED_CASTES_RURAL_POPULATION = '0.000' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) > 20 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan scheduled tribes ki total rural population zero se zyada hai aur scheduled castes ki total rural population exactly zero hai.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) > 0.000 AND SUM(T2.SCHEDULED_CASTES_RURAL_POPULATION) = 0.000

question: 'West Godavari' district ke har ek sub-district ka naam aur unki total rural population list karo, aur results ko total rural population ke descending order mein sort karo.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'West Godavari' GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION) DESC

question: 'North And Middle Andaman' district ke har ek sub-district ke names aur unki total rural population list karo, aur results ko total rural population ke descending order mein sort karo.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'North And Middle Andaman' GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION) DESC

question: 'North And Middle Andaman' district ke un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan total rural population 500 se zyada hai, aur results ko total rural population ke descending order mein sort karo.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'North And Middle Andaman' GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION) > 500 ORDER BY SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION) DESC

question: 'West Godavari' district ke un sub-districts ke names list karo jahan total rural population 1000 se zyada hai, aur results ko total rural population ke descending order mein arrange karo.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'West Godavari' GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION) > 1000 ORDER BY SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION) DESC

question: Har district ke liye district name, total rural population, aur scheduled tribes ki total rural population list karo, aur results ko total rural population ke descending order mein sort karo.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.RURAL_POPULATION), SUM(T2.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T2 ON T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.RURAL_POPULATION) DESC

question: Har district ke liye district ID, total rural population, aur scheduled tribes ki total rural population list karo, aur result ko total rural population ke descending order mein sort karo.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_ID, SUM(T2.RURAL_POPULATION), SUM(T2.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T2 ON T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_ID ORDER BY SUM(T2.RURAL_POPULATION) DESC

question: Har district ke liye district name, total rural population, aur scheduled tribes ki total rural population list karo, aur results ko total rural population ke hisaab se descending order mein sort karo.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION), SUM(T3.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION) DESC;

question: 'North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', aur 'Nicobars' districts ke liye district names, total rural population, aur total scheduled tribes rural population ki list dikhao, jise district name se group kiya gaya ho aur total rural population ke hisaab se descending order mein sort kiya gaya ho.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION), SUM(T3.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME IN ('North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars') GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION) DESC;

question: Har district ka district name, total rural population, aur total scheduled tribes rural population list karo jahan total rural population 1109.000 se zyada ho, aur results ko total rural population ke hisaab se descending order mein sort karo.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.RURAL_POPULATION) AS total_rural_pop, SUM(T2.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) AS total_st_rural_pop FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T2 ON T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.RURAL_POPULATION) > 1109.000 ORDER BY total_rural_pop DESC

question: State ID 1 ke liye, saare district names list karo unki total rural population aur total scheduled tribes rural population ke saath, lekin sirf un sub-districts ko consider karna jahan rural population 500 se zyada hai, aur results ko total rural population ke hisaab se descending order mein sort kar dena.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION), SUM(T3.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_ID = 1 AND T3.RURAL_POPULATION > 500 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.RURAL_POPULATION) DESC

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan rural population 1109.000 se zyada ho ya scheduled tribes rural population 0.000 se zyada ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.RURAL_POPULATION > 1109.000 OR T2.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION > 0.000

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan ya toh rural population 1109.000 se zyada hai ya scheduled tribes rural population 23.000 se exceed karti hai.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.RURAL_POPULATION > 1109.000 OR T2.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION > 23.000

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan rural population 1109.000 se zyada hai aur number of households 208.000 se exceed karte hain.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.RURAL_POPULATION > 1109.000 AND T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS > 208.000;

question: Har sub-district name aur total rural population list karo un sub-districts ke liye jahan rural population ka sum 524.000 se zyada hai aur total number of households 148.000 se upar hain, aur results ko sub-district name ke hisaab se alphabetically order karo.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.RURAL_POPULATION) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_POPULATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.RURAL_POPULATION) > 524.000 AND SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) > 148.000 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME

question: Un sub-district names aur unke corresponding district names ki list dikhao jahan homeopathic dispensaries ka number zero se zyada ho ya ayurvedic dispensaries ka number zero se zyada ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES AS T3 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T3.NUMBER_OF_HOMEOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES > 0.000 OR T3.NUMBER_OF_AYURVEDIC_DISPENSARY > 0.000

question: Un saare districts aur sub-districts ke district names aur sub-district names list karo jahan total number of Ayurvedic dispensaries aur total number of Homeopathic dispensaries kam se kam zero ho, aur result ko district name ke hisaab se alphabetically order karo.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AYURVEDIC_DISPENSARY) >= 0.000 AND SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_HOMEOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES) >= 0.000 ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Un saare areas ke sub-district names aur unke corresponding district names list karo jahan total number of Ayurvedic dispensaries kam se kam 0 ho ya total number of homeopathic dispensaries kam se kam 0 ho, aur result ko district name aur phir sub-district name ke hisaab se alphabetically order karo.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AYURVEDIC_DISPENSARY) >= 0.000 OR SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_HOMEOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES) >= 0.000 ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ASC, T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: 'North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', aur 'Nicobars' districts ke liye sub-district names aur unke corresponding district names list karo, jahan total number of ayurvedic dispensaries ya total number of homeopathic dispensaries kam se kam zero ho, aur result ko district name aur phir sub-district name ke hisaab se alphabetically order karo.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME IN ('North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars') GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AYURVEDIC_DISPENSARY) >= 0.000 OR SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_HOMEOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES) >= 0.000 ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ASC, T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: 'North And Middle Andaman' district ke liye, har sub-district name aur unke total healthcare facility IDs ka count dikhao, par sirf wahi sub-districts include karna jisme kam se kam ek facility ho, aur results ko count ke hisaab se descending order mein sort kar dena.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T2.FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES_ID) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T3.DISTRICT_NAME = 'North And Middle Andaman' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES_ID) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(T2.FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES_ID) DESC

question: 'North And Middle Andaman' district ke liye, har sub-district name aur Ayurvedic, Unani, aur Homeopathic dispensaries ka total combined count list karo, aur ise highest se lowest total ke order mein sort karo.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AYURVEDIC_DISPENSARY + T3.NUMBER_OF_UNANI_DISPENSARIES + T3.NUMBER_OF_HOMEOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'North And Middle Andaman' GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AYURVEDIC_DISPENSARY + T3.NUMBER_OF_UNANI_DISPENSARIES + T3.NUMBER_OF_HOMEOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES) DESC

question: 'Diglipur' naam ke sub-district ka sub-district name dikhao jahan allopathic hospitals ka number exactly 0.000 ho aur ayurvedic dispensaries ka number 0.000 se zyada ya barabar ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.NUMBER_OF_ALLOPATHIC_HOSPITALS = '0.000' AND T2.NUMBER_OF_AYURVEDIC_DISPENSARY >= '0.000' AND T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME = 'Diglipur';

question: 'South Andamans' district ke andar jo sub-district names hain unhe list karo, unke names ke hisaab se group karke. Inhe Ayurvedic, Unani, aur Homeopathic dispensaries ke total sum ke descending order mein sort karo aur sirf top 5 results dikhao.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'South Andamans' GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AYURVEDIC_DISPENSARY + T3.NUMBER_OF_UNANI_DISPENSARIES + T3.NUMBER_OF_HOMEOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES) DESC LIMIT 5

question: 'North And Middle Andaman' district ke wo sub-district names list karo jinka ayurvedic, unani, aur homeopathic dispensaries ka total sum descending order mein ho, aur sirf top 5 results dikhao jahan ye combined sum kam se kam zero ho.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T1.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'North And Middle Andaman' GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AYURVEDIC_DISPENSARY + T3.NUMBER_OF_UNANI_DISPENSARIES + T3.NUMBER_OF_HOMEOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES) >= 0 ORDER BY SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AYURVEDIC_DISPENSARY + T3.NUMBER_OF_UNANI_DISPENSARIES + T3.NUMBER_OF_HOMEOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES) DESC LIMIT 5

question: 'South Andamans' district ke wo sub-district names list karo jinka ayurvedic, unani, aur homeopathic dispensaries ka total sum zero ya usse zyada hai, inhein total sum ke descending order mein sort karo aur sirf top 5 results dikhao.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T1.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'South Andamans' GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AYURVEDIC_DISPENSARY + T3.NUMBER_OF_UNANI_DISPENSARIES + T3.NUMBER_OF_HOMEOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES) >= 0 ORDER BY SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AYURVEDIC_DISPENSARY + T3.NUMBER_OF_UNANI_DISPENSARIES + T3.NUMBER_OF_HOMEOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES) DESC LIMIT 5

question: 'North And Middle Andaman' district ke top 5 sub-districts ke names aur unka total number of AYUSH dispensaries list karo—jisme Ayurvedic, Unani, aur Homeopathic dispensaries ka sum calculate kiya gaya ho—aur results ko total dispensaries ke descending order mein sort karo.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AYURVEDIC_DISPENSARY + T3.NUMBER_OF_UNANI_DISPENSARIES + T3.NUMBER_OF_HOMEOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES) AS TOTAL_AYUSH_DISPENSARIES FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'North And Middle Andaman' GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY TOTAL_AYUSH_DISPENSARIES DESC LIMIT 5

question: 'West Godavari' district ke liye, sub-district names aur total AYUSH dispensaries ki list nikaalo—jo Ayurvedic, Unani, aur Homeopathic dispensaries ka sum ho—aur highest totals waale top 5 sub-districts dikhao.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AYURVEDIC_DISPENSARY + T3.NUMBER_OF_UNANI_DISPENSARIES + T3.NUMBER_OF_HOMEOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES) AS TOTAL_AYUSH_DISPENSARIES FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'West Godavari' GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY TOTAL_AYUSH_DISPENSARIES DESC LIMIT 5

question: Har sub-district aur district combination ke liye sub-district name aur district name list karo, saath hi total number of ayurvedic dispensaries aur total number of allopathic hospitals bhi dikhao, jahan total number of homeopathic dispensaries zero se zyada ho.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_AYURVEDIC_DISPENSARY), SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_ALLOPATHIC_HOSPITALS) FROM FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_HOMEOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES) > 0.000

question: Un sabhi areas ke sub-district name, district name, Ayurvedic dispensaries ki count, aur Allopathic dispensaries ki count list karo jahan Homeopathic dispensaries ka number kam se kam 0.000 ho.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME, T3.NUMBER_OF_AYURVEDIC_DISPENSARY, T3.NUMBER_OF_ALLOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T3.NUMBER_OF_HOMEOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES >= 0.000

question: Har sub-district ke liye district name aur sub-district name list karo, saath hi total number of ayurvedic dispensaries aur total number of allopathic hospitals bhi dikhao. Sirf unhe filter karo jahan homeopathic dispensaries zero se zyada hain, aur results ko district name ke hisaab se order karo.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AYURVEDIC_DISPENSARY), SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_ALLOPATHIC_HOSPITALS) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_HOMEOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES) > 0.000 ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME

question: District name aur sub-district name list karo, saath hi har district aur sub-district ke liye Unani dispensaries aur Allopathic dispensaries ka total count dikhao, unhe filter karte hue jahan Homeopathic dispensaries ka total number kam se kam 0.000 ho, aur results ko district name ke hisaab se order karo.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_UNANI_DISPENSARIES), SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_ALLOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_HEALTHCARE_FACILITIES AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_HOMEOPATHIC_DISPENSARIES) >= 0.000 ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME

question: 'North And Middle Andaman' district ke liye, har sub-district name aur community health workers ka total count list karo, aur results ko total number of community health workers ke hisaab se descending order mein sort karo.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_ID IN (SELECT DISTRICT_ID FROM DIM_DISTRICT WHERE DISTRICT_NAME = 'North And Middle Andaman') GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) DESC

question: 'North And Middle Andaman' district ke har ek sub-district ka naam aur wahan ke total community health workers ki count list karo, aur results ko total community health workers ke descending order mein display karo.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'North And Middle Andaman' GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) DESC

question: 'West Godavari' district ke liye, har sub-district ka naam aur community health workers ka total count list karo, ye ensure karte hue ki sum kam se kam 0.000 ho, aur results ko total number of community health workers ke hisaab se descending order mein sort karo.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'West Godavari' GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) >= 0.000 ORDER BY SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) DESC

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan registered private medical practitioners ka number 0 ya usse zyada hai aur community health workers ka number exactly 0 hai.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS >= 0.000 AND T2.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS = 0.000

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan subsidized medical practitioners ka number kam se kam 0.000 ho aur community health workers ka number exactly 0.000 ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.NUMBER_OF_SUBSIDED_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS >= 0.000 AND T2.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS = 0.000

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan registered private medical practitioners ka number kam se kam 0.000 ho aur community health workers ka number exactly 0.000 ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS >= 0.000 AND T2.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS = 0.000

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan number of community health workers 0.000 hai aur registered private medical practitioners ka total sum 0.000 se zyada ya barabar hai, sub-district name ke hisaab se group karke.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS = 0.000 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS) >= 0.000

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan total number of registered private medical practitioners kam se kam 0 ho aur total number of community health workers exactly 0 ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS) >= 0.000 AND SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) = 0.000

question: Diglipur, Mayabunder, Ferrargunj, Great Nicobar, aur Rangat ke sub-districts ke liye sub-district names list karo, jahan total number of registered private medical practitioners kam se kam zero ho aur total number of community health workers exactly zero ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME IN ('Diglipur', 'Mayabunder', 'Ferrargunj', 'Great Nicobar', 'Rangat') GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS) >= 0.000 AND SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) = 0.000

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan registered private medical practitioners ka number 0 se zyada ho ya community health workers ka number 1 se zyada ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT T1 JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS > 0.000 OR T2.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS > 1.000;

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan registered private medical practitioners ki sankhya zero se zyada ho ya community health workers ka number zero se bada ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS > 0.000 OR T2.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS > 0.000

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan total number of registered private medical practitioners 10 se zyada hain ya total number of community health workers 5 se exceed karte hain.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS) > 10 OR SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) > 5

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan total number of registered private medical practitioners zero se zyada ho ya total number of community health workers one se zyada ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS) > 0.000 OR SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) > 1.000

question: Har district ke liye, district name aur registered private medical practitioners aur community health workers ka total combined number list karo.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS + T2.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS S ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = S.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T2 ON S.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME;

question: 'North And Middle Andaman' district ke liye, district ID aur registered private medical practitioners aur community health workers ka total sum provide karein, district ID ke hisaab se group karke.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_ID, SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS + T2.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS S ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = S.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T2 ON S.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'North And Middle Andaman' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_ID;

question: 'North And Middle Andaman' aur 'South Andamans' districts ke liye, har district name aur registered private medical practitioners aur community health workers ka total sum list karo.
sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS + T1.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) FROM FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T3.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.DISTRICT_NAME IN ('North And Middle Andaman', 'South Andamans') GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME;

question: Har ek district name list karo, saath mein total number of registered private medical practitioners aur total number of community health workers bhi dikhao, district name ke hisaab se group karke aur total number of registered private medical practitioners ke descending order mein sort karke.
sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS), SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) FROM FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS) DESC

question: Har district ka naam aur registered private medical practitioners aur community health workers ka total sum list karo, sirf un districts ko include karna jahan ye combined total zero se zyada ho, aur results ko highest se lowest total sum ke order mein arrange karo.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS + T3.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS + T3.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) > 0.000 ORDER BY SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS + T3.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) DESC

question: North And Middle Andaman, West Godavari, Nicobars, Kurnool, aur South Andamans districts ke liye, har district name aur community health workers aur registered private medical practitioners ka total combined sum list karo, ye ensure karte hue ki total kam se kam 0.000 ho, aur results ko is total sum ke hisaab se descending order mein sort karo.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS + T3.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME IN ('North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars', 'Kurnool', 'South Andamans') GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS + T3.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS) >= 0.000 ORDER BY SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS + T3.NUMBER_OF_REGISTERED_PRIVATE_MEDICAL_PRACTITIONERS) DESC

question: Har sub-district aur district ke liye, sub-district name, district name aur community health workers ka total number list karo, aur inhein unke respective names ke hisaab se group karo.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T3 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME

question: 'Diglipur', 'Mayabunder', aur 'Ferrargunj' sub-districts ke liye, sub-district name, district name, aur community health workers ka total count list karo, aur ise sub-district aur district ke basis pe group karo.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_COMMUNITY_HEALTH_WORKERS) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_MEDICAL_PERSONNEL AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME IN ('Diglipur', 'Mayabunder', 'Ferrargunj') GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao, alphabetically order mein, jahan kam se kam ek commercial bank ho aur zero ya usse zyada agricultural credit societies hon.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_COMMERCIAL_BANKS) >= 1.000 AND SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) >= 0.000 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan ek se zyada commercial bank ho ya kam se kam ek agricultural credit society ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.NUMBER_OF_COMMERCIAL_BANKS > 1.000 OR T2.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES > 0.000

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan kam se kam ek commercial bank ho ya phir kam se kam ek agricultural credit society ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.NUMBER_OF_COMMERCIAL_BANKS > 0.000 OR T2.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES > 0.000

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan ek se zyada commercial bank ho ya kam se kam ek agricultural credit society ho.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.NUMBER_OF_COMMERCIAL_BANKS > 1.000 OR T2.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES > 0.000

question: Har district ke liye, district name aur agricultural credit societies aur other credit societies ka total sum list karo.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES + T3.NUMBER_OF_OTHER_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME;

question: Har ek district ke liye, district name list karo aur total number of agricultural credit societies aur total number of other credit societies calculate karo, aur result ko district name ke hisaab se alphabetically order mein dikhao.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES), SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_OTHER_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: 'North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', aur 'Nicobars' districts ke liye, har district ka naam, total number of agricultural credit societies, aur total number of other credit societies ki list dikhao, aur ise district name ke hisaab se alphabetically order karo.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES), SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_OTHER_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME IN ('North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars') GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Har ek district name list karo aur saath mein agricultural credit societies aur other credit societies ka total sum bhi dikhao, bas ye dhyan rakhna ki total sum zero se zyada ho aur results total ke hisaab se descending order mein sorted hon.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES + T3.NUMBER_OF_OTHER_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES + T3.NUMBER_OF_OTHER_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) > 0.000 ORDER BY SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES + T3.NUMBER_OF_OTHER_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) DESC

question: Har sub-district aur district ke liye, sub-district name, district name, aur agricultural credit societies ka total number list karo.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) FROM FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.DISTRICT_NAME

question: 'Diglipur' aur 'Mayabunder' sub-districts ke liye, sub-district name, district name, aur agricultural credit societies ka total number list karo, aur ise sub-district aur district dono ke hisaab se group karo.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) FROM FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME IN ('Diglipur', 'Mayabunder') GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.DISTRICT_NAME

question: Har sub-district name aur uske corresponding district name ki list dikhao, saath hi agricultural credit societies ka total count bhi dena. Is data ko sub-district aur district ke hisaab se group karo aur count ko highest se lowest order mein sort karo.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T1.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) FROM FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T1.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) DESC

question: 'North And Middle Andaman' aur 'West Godavari' districts ke liye sub-district names, district names aur agricultural credit societies ka count dikhao, sub-district aur district ke hisaab se group karke aur count ko descending order mein sort karke.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T1.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) FROM FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T3.DISTRICT_NAME IN ('North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari') GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T1.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) DESC

question: Diglipur, Mayabunder, Ferrargunj, Great Nicobar, aur Rangat sub-districts ke liye sub-district names, district names, aur total number of agricultural credit societies ki list dikhao. Data ko sub-district aur district ke hisaab se group karo aur agricultural credit societies ke sum ke basis par highest se lowest order mein sort karo.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME IN ('Diglipur', 'Mayabunder', 'Ferrargunj', 'Great Nicobar', 'Rangat') GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) DESC;

question: Un sub-district IDs ki list dikhao jahan agricultural credit societies ka number 0.000 hai.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES = 0.000

question: District ID 1 ke un sub-district names ki list dikhao jahan agricultural credit societies exactly 0.000 hain, aur results ko sub-district name ke hisaab se alphabetically order karo.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES = '0.000' AND T1.DISTRICT_ID = 1 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME

question: Un sub-district names ki list dikhao jo district ID 1 mein hain aur jahan agricultural credit societies ka total sum 0.000 ke barabar hai.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_ID = 1 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) = 0.000

question: 'North And Middle Andaman', 'Nicobars', aur 'South Andamans' districts ke liye, un sub-districts ki sub-district IDs aur sub-district names list karo jahan total number of agricultural credit societies zero hai ya commercial banks ka count zero hai, aur result ko sub-district name ke hisaab se alphabetically order karo.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID, T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID LEFT JOIN FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME IN ('North And Middle Andaman', 'Nicobars', 'South Andamans') GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID, T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) = 0.000 OR COUNT(T3.NUMBER_OF_COMMERCIAL_BANKS) = 0 ORDER BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
